name: Mini Taco Quiches
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350°F. Grease 12 muffin pan cups. Set aside.
Cook beef and onions in a large nonstick skillet until meat is browned; drain. Remove from heat.
Stir in olives, tomato sauce, 1/4 cup water, taco seasoning, hot pepper sauce, and egg; mix well.
Using 3-inch cookie cutter, cut each flour tortilla into 3 rounds. Fit each tortilla round into prepared muffin cups.
Fill each tortilla cup with 1/4 cup meat mixture. Top each with sour cream and cheese. Bake for 25 minutes or until heated through.
